name: Hidden Files and Directories
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Pawel Mazur
SIGMA Title: Hidden Files and Directories
SIGMA Description: Detects adversary creating hidden file or directory, by detecting directories or files with . as the first character

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=11 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%mkdir%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%touch%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%vim%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%nano%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%vi%')) AND (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%/.%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%.%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a2%/.%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a2%.%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Hidden Files and Directories on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=11 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%mkdir%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%touch%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%vim%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%nano%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%vi%')) AND (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%/.%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%.%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a2%/.%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a2%.%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Hidden Files and Directories
